name: Commercial Laundry Payment V1 Attribute Bitmap
description: This API supports V1 of the commercial laundry payment process, which is support of phases 0-9 defined in ERD 0x209F. Feature bits included in this bitmap are additional features built into the V1 payment process. If the bit is true, the given feature is supported in the payment process.
comment: Commercial Laundry Payment V1 Attribute Bitmap: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Current
description: The current value of timed cycle total duration in minutes.
comment: Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Current: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Request
description:
This ERD requests a change in 0x211F Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Current

Notes:
- The field IsRequested will be set to false after the request is processed.
- If the request is granted, the value will be reflected in 0x211F Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Current

Depends on:
- 0x201C Dryer Cycle Type must be Timed Dry
- 0x2000 Machine State must not be Idle or Commissioning
- 0x2001 MachineSubCycle must not be CoolDown (130) or ExtendedTumble (131)
comment: Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Allowable Range
description: Range of allowable option values for timed cycle total duration option. If allowed is true a value in the range of min and max is allowed.
comment: Timed Cycle Total Duration Option Allowable Range: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Laundry Combi Unit Remaining Wash Cycle Time

name: Laundry Combi Unit Remaining Dry Cycle Time
description: The remaining dry time
comment: Laundry Combi Unit Remaining Dry Cycle Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Remote Sensored Dry Only Cycle Start Command
description:
Write zero to this ERD to start the Sensor Dry only cycle.

Depends on
- ERD 0x2000 must be End Of Cycle
- ERD 0x2039 must be Enabled.

values.0: Start sensored dry only cycle command

comment: Remote Sensored Dry Only Cycle Start Command: Enum writable select.

After this ERD is written by a client, it will be updated with an invalid value.

name: Softener Bulk Tank Size
description: The size of the Smart Dispense bulk softener tank. Value of 65535 indicates number of loads unknown.

comment: Softener Bulk Tank Size: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Bulk Softener Tank Level
description: Amount of softener left in the Smart Dispense bulk softener tank.

comment: Bulk Softener Tank Level: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Softener Tank Level Became 'Low' At End Of Cycle
description: Each time this signal value changes, the amount of softener in the Smart softener Dispense tank has transitioned from 'Filled' to 'Low' in the process of running a cycle with Smart Dispense on. It is stored in NV memory.

data.name: Smart Dispense Softener Tank Transitioned to Low

comment: Smart Dispense Softener Tank Level Became 'Low' At End Of Cycle: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Flow Rate Bucket Selection
description: This ERD determines which flow rate bucket is selected for smart softener dispense. Number of buckets is determined by 0x2142. It is stored in NV memory.
comment: Smart Softener Dispense Flow Rate Bucket Selection: Enum writable select.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Time
description: Duration of softener dispense.

comment: Smart Softener Dispense Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Softener Cumulative Dispense Time
description: Cumulative duration of softener dispense.

data.name: Smart Softener Dispense Time in Seconds

comment: Smart Softener Cumulative Dispense Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Feature Version
description:
Feature version of Smart softener dispense adjustability.
Bucket configuration for each version listed on:
https://github.com/geappliances/mobile.brand-content/blob/prd/apps/smarthq/US/en-US/laundry/SoftenerType.json

data.name: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Feature Version

comment: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Feature Version: Version information sensor.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Request
description: Request a change of the smart softener dispense adjustability.
comment: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Request: Multi-field enum, may need custom handling.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Option
description: Specifies the option value for smart softener dispense adjustability. The smart dispense adjustability request from the client is applied if the option is allowed by mapped bit on the smart dispense allowable ERD.
comment: Smart Softener Dispense Adjustability Option: Multi-field enum sensor, may need custom handling.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Usage Profile Record Auto
description: Number of times a cycle has been run with the "auto" setting of smart dispense. Count should be increased upon cycle end. Counter should not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Softener Dispense Usage Profile Record Auto: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Usage Profile Record Less
description: Number of times a Smart Softener Dispense cycle has been run with the "Less" user selection. Count is increased when the cycle ends. The count does not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Softener Dispense Usage Profile Record Less: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Usage Profile Record More
description: Number of times a Smart Softener Dispense cycle has been run with the "More" user selection. Count is increased when the cycle ends. The count does not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Softener Dispense Usage Profile Record More: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Softener Dispense Estimated Loads Remaining
description: Number of Smart Softener Dispense cycles remaining based on detergent level. Value of 255 indicates unknown number of loads remaining.

data.name: Smart Softener Dispense Estimated Loads Remaining

comment: Smart Softener Dispense Estimated Loads Remaining: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Remote Start Selected Cycle
description: Client only can write into this ERD once the Remote Start Allowable Status (0x214A) is enabled.
comment: Remote Start Selected Cycle: One-shot button to start a remote cycle.

name: Remote Start Allowable Status
description:
Indicates if a cycle can be started remotely.

The firmware is responsible for setting this ERD only when the unit is able to remotely start.
comment: Remote Start Allowable Status: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Washer and Dryer Combi Push Notifications
description:
Byte 0 & 1: Individual bits to be controlled by the firmware when a push notification needs to be sent.
            Critical for the firmware to only set a bit at a time to avoid sending multiple push notifications.
            All bits must be cleared at the beginning of a cycle.
Byte 2 & 3: Notification Allowable bits. If a specific feature bit is set to zero, the notification for that feature is NOT supported for a given platform.

data.name: Remove Lint From Mesh Filter Notification
Self Clean Cycle Reminder Notification Supported
Remove Lint From Mesh Filter Notification Supported
Clean v2 Foam Filter Notification Supported

comment: Washer and Dryer Combi Push Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: Use this ERD to request a change of the 0x2155 Wash complete cycle notification option. After being written, this ERD is invalidated by changing it to an undefined value.

description: Current cycle load size as measured by counting items. Use case is for specialised functions on a small load that are sensitive to the number of items.  Useful for the Fabric Care Cabinet and Clothes Dryer steam cycles.

description: Use this ERD to request a change of ERD 0x2150, the load item count. After this ERD is written by a client, it will be updated with an request processed value of 255.

name: Profile Clean Closet Push Notifications
description:
Byte 0 & 1: Individual bits to be controlled by the firmware when a push notification needs to be sent.
            Critical for the firmware to only set a bit at a time to avoid sending multiple push notifications.
            All bits must be cleared at the beginning of a cycle.

Byte 2 & 3: Notification Allowable bits. If a specific feature bit is set to zero, the notification for that feature is NOT supported for a given platform.

data.name: Water Tank Not Detected Notification Supported

comment: Profile Clean Closet Push Notifications: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Dryer Heater Type
description: ERD to indicate the dryer heater type.
comment: Dryer Heater Type: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Cycle Pricing Request
description:
This erd requests a change to the cycle pricing menu.
Upon each request, the portal will populate each entry and use CycleSelected_NotDefined for entries that are not used.
comment: Cycle Pricing Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cycle Pricing Status
description:
This erd is the status of the cycle pricing menu.
The status will populate unused entries with CycleSelected_NotDefined.
comment: Cycle Pricing Status: Pricing data, not user-facing.

name: Option Pricing Request
description:
This erd requests a change to the option pricing menu.
Upon each request, the portal will populate each entry and use OptionId_DontCare (0xFF) for entries that are not used.
Available options and their available levels will be exposed in 0x209E.
Both washer and dryer have two separate enumerations for OptionId. And so, the portal will use ApplianceType to determine which enumeration to use.
comment: Option Pricing Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Option Pricing Status
description:
This erd is the status of the option pricing menu.
The status will populate unused entries with OptionId_DontCare (0xFF).
Available options and their available levels will be exposed in 0x209E.
Both washer and dryer have two separate enumerations for OptionId. And so, the portal will use ApplianceType to determine which enumeration to use.
comment: Option Pricing Status: Internal pricing menu data, not user-facing. Filtered.

name: Mid-Cycle Adjustment Pricing Request
description:
This erd requests a change to the Mid-Cycle Adjustment pricing menu.
Upon each request, the portal will populate each entry and use MidCycleAdjustment_NotDefined for entries that are not used.
comment: Mid-Cycle Adjustment Pricing Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Mid-Cycle Adjustment Pricing Status
description:
This erd is the status of the Mid-Cycle Adjustment pricing menu.
The status will populate unused entries with MidCycleAdjustment_NotDefined.
comment: Mid-Cycle Adjustment Pricing Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

comment: Coins Collected Since Last Opening: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coin Box Capacity
description: This erd is to indicate the capacity of the coinbox
comment: Coin Box Capacity: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Coin Box Open Status
description: This erd is the status of whether the coinbox is open
comment: Coin Box Open Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Coin Value
description: This erd is to indicate the coin value and currency that the coinbox receives
comment: Coin Value: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Smart Combi Option Status
description:
When laundry center enables this option, it will automatically select a dryer cycle and
will run the cycle to preheat the dryer before the washer completes the wash cycle.

As a user, I want the correct dryer settings to automatically be set based on my wash selection,
when I want to wash and dry a load. So that I do not have to manually set it twice.
comment: Smart Combi Option Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Smart Combi Option Request
description: Use this ERD to request a change of ERD 0x216E smart combi option.
comment: Smart Combi Option Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Laundry Center Push Notifications
description:
Byte 0, 1, 2 & 3: Individual bits to be controlled by the firmware when a push notification needs to be sent.
            Critical for the firmware to only set one bit at a time to avoid sending multiple push notifications.
            All bits must be cleared at the beginning of a cycle.
Byte 4, 5, 6 & 7: Notification Allowable bits. If a specific feature bit is set to zero, the notification for that feature is NOT supported for a given platform.

data.name: Self Clean Cycle Reminder Notification Supported

comment: Laundry Center Push Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Reset Current Coin Box Count Request
description:
This erd requests a change to the coin box coin count.
Upon request, the device will clear the coins counted since last opening reported in 0x216A.
The device shall write the value of this ERD to request consumed once the coin count has been reset.

data.name: Reset Current Coin Box Count Request Status

comment: Reset Current Coin Box Count Request: Reset/restart button.

comment: Smart Wash And Rinse Option Selection: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

10 minutes until end of cycle Notification
15 minutes until end of cycle Notification

10 minutes until end of cycle Notification
15 minutes until end of cycle Notification

comment: Dryer Supported Notifications: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Drum Light Option Selection
description: Current selection for the Drum Light Option.
comment: Drum Light Option Selection: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Drum Light Option Request
description:
Use this ERD to request a change of the ERD 0x217C Drum Light Option.
- Follows the [Option with Bitmapped Allowables](https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.erd-specification/blob/master/docs/clothes_dryer/option_bitmap_allowables.md)
comment: Drum Light Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Drum Light Option Allowables
description: Bitmap of allowable option selections for the drum light option. If the bit is true the given setting is allowed.

data.name: Drum Light Option Allowables.Drum Light Option - Off Allowed
Drum Light Option Allowables.Drum Light Option - On Allowed

comment: Drum Light Option Allowables: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Delay Start Status
description:
This ERD reports the current status of Delay Start

Notes:
- Delay Duration Minutes will be counted down and updated every minute when field IsEnabled is true.
- When field Delay Duration Minutes reaches 0, delay started cycle will run.
comment: Delay Start Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Delay Start Duration Request
description:
Use this ERD to request a change of the ERD 0x217F Delay Start Status

Notes:
- The field RequestedState requests to Disable (false) or Enable (true) the feature.
- The field IsRequested should be set to true to request a delay start.
- The field IsRequested is set to false after the request is processed.
- If the request is granted, the value will be reflected in 0x217F Delay Start Status.

data.name: Delay Start Duration Request In Minutes

comment: Delay Start Duration Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Delay Start Duration Allowable
description:
Range of allowable values for Delay Start

Notes:
- If field IsAllowed is true, a value in the range of min and max is allowed for DelayDurationMinutes of 0x2180 Delay Start Request.
comment: Delay Start Duration Allowable: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Additional Cavity Machine State
description: The current state of the laundry machine's additional cavity.
comment: Additional Cavity Machine State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Additional Cavity Sub Cycle State
description: The current sub-cycle of the laundry machine additional cavity.
comment: Additional Cavity Sub Cycle State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Additional Cavity Remaining Cycle Time
description:
The amount of time in seconds remaining before the laundry additional cavity cycle completes.

Depends on
- 0x2200 Machine State Must be Run.
comment: Additional Cavity Remaining Cycle Time: Timer/duration value.
